title: Permission Group Management
description: Creating and managing permission groups, assigning users to groups, granting/revoking group permissions, and querying group access

actors.name: AuthenticatedUser
actors.description: Any logged-in user with a valid session token. Must own a group to manage its membership. Must be a UserActorType (not app/API token) to grant/revoke user-group permissions.

actors.name: GroupOwner
actors.description: Subset of AuthenticatedUser who created (owns) a specific group. Required for add-users, remove-users operations.

actors.name: SystemAdmin
actors.description: System-level config; provides default_user_group and default_temp_group as public groups.

use_cases.name: Create Permission Group
validations: rate limit: max 20 groups per user per hour → APIError('too_many_requests')

use_cases.name: Add Users to Group
validations: users must be array of strings
db_ops: INSERT INTO jct_user_group (user_id, group_id) via JOIN on username

use_cases.name: Remove Users from Group
validations: users must be array of strings
db_ops: DELETE FROM jct_user_group WHERE group_id=? AND user_id IN (SELECT by username)

use_cases.name: List Groups
db_ops: SELECT * FROM `group` WHERE id IN (SELECT group_id FROM jct_user_group WHERE user_id=?)
SELECT * FROM `group` WHERE uid IN (default_user_group, default_temp_group) — Redis cached 60s

use_cases.name: Check App ACL
use_cases.notes: Registered via eggspress; checks app-level access control

use_cases.name: Change Password / Email / Username
middleware_chain: block temp accounts (password=null AND email=null) → APIError('temporary_account')
bcrypt password verify OR JWT revalidation cookie verify → APIError('password_mismatch'/'password_required'/'oidc_revalidation_required')

use_cases.name: Disable 2FA
use_cases.middleware_chain: Same as UC9 — full user-protected middleware stack

use_cases.name: Delete Own User
use_cases.notes: Only user-protected endpoint that bypasses temp-account check

key_services.name: PermissionAPIService
responsibilities: Delegates permission grant/revoke to PermissionService (via routers)

key_services.name: UserProtectedEndpointsService
responsibilities: Mounts /user-protected/* routes with strict identity verification middleware
auth_requirements: bcrypt password OR OIDC JWT revalidation cookie

error_types: APIError('forbidden') — actor not owner or not UserActorType
APIError('too_many_requests') — rate limit (>20 groups/hour) or edge rate limit
APIError('temporary_account') — temp user accessing protected endpoints
APIError('user_tokens_only') — non-user actor on user-protected route
key_relationships: PermissionAPIService mounts routers that depend_on PermissionService
GroupService uses Database (DB_WRITE) and Redis cache
PermissionService uses Database (DB_WRITE) and Redis cache
database_schema_implied: `group` table: id, uid (UUID), owner_user_id, extra (JSON), metadata (JSON), created_at
`jct_user_group` table: user_id, group_id (junction for group membership)
important_notes: All group endpoints require configurable_auth middleware. Group ownership enforced per-operation (not just at creation). Public groups are system-defined via global_config (default_user_group, default_temp_group) and Redis-cached 60s. User-protected endpoints require HTTP-only session cookie — API tokens/GUI tokens rejected. OIDC-only users must use JWT revalidation cookie instead of password. Rate limit on group creation: 20 groups per user per hour.
